transcription.text: Cannes Lions is a mecca of marketing and this time next month, I want to be in the South of France. So this is my 2026 Cannes Lions brand pitch. By the way, I'm Christina. I'm a travel content creator and digital nomad. I specialize in travel hacks that help people travel almost free. And for anyone that's skeptical that needs receipts, my work has been featured in Forbes. First, let's talk about timing because I fully recognize we're 36 days away from the first day at the Cannes Lions Festival, which in marketing terms means we need to move fast. Now logistics. What do we need? A one-way flight back because I already got my one-way flight there. Since I leave nothing up to chance. Hotel accommodations and access. Now rules. My only rule is if I don't love it or use it in real life, or I don't think I can add value, it doesn't make the list. All right, brands, listen up because here's the pitch. Here are three reasons why I think we should partner. Number one, I'm an ex-corporate girlie. Yes, I quit my corporate job on Wall Street and HR to build a life of freedom. But even though I went through a career pivot, I still operate with a high-performance mindset. So if you're looking for fast execution and content built for real-time relevance, I'm your girl. Number two, bucket list experiences are my lane. And my obsession is simple, creating moments that make you feel alive watching them. Can is the bucket list experience for creators. And I know how to translate it into content that actually captures this energy. And number three, I got 815,000 friends that want to travel with me. And in my world, the trip always leaves the group chat. To make that happen, all we need is one yes.
